posts.title: Brazil: World Cup Kickoff Preview (Sample Post)
posts.body: Sample post generated for testing this site's layout — not a real match report. Brazil came into this test bracket leaning on a possession-heavy build-up game, and it showed early. The squad looked settled from the opening whistle, with the same starting XI carried across both group matches below. Match 1 — Brazil 0, Netherlands 0. A settled opening performance, with the goals shared across both halves and the back line rarely troubled after the first twenty minutes. Match 2 — Brazil 2, Japan 0. A tighter, more cagey match against Japan, decided by a handful of key moments either side of the hour mark. Two matches in, the shape of their group is starting to take form.
